description: Lock industrial cinema distribution to early motion-picture production/distribution and remove unsupported newspaper and recorded-music prerequisites.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to the decade around Pathé/Gaumont industrialization and early nickelodeon-era film distribution and exhibition.
A network for film prints, projection, and exhibition requires the motion-picture medium.
Newspaper publicity may advertise shows, but it is not source-backed as a direct prerequisite for film-print distribution or exhibition networks.
The 1905 silent-era distribution scope should not depend directly on the separate phonograph-based recorded-music industry.
